tasks.intent:
Log into the admin panel at https://admin.popyachts.com/

1. Navigate to https://admin.popyachts.com/
2. Click 'Sign in with Google' (or the login button)
3. Enter email: , click Next
4. Enter password: SelfService38#, click Next
5. If 2FA requested: terminate('failure') with '2FA required'
6. Wait for redirect back to admin panel

ONE attempt only. terminate('success') when logged in.

Set up user impersonation on the admin panel.

1. Scroll DOWN past the dashboard content
2. Find the 'User Management' section
3. Do NOT use the dropdown at the top-left corner
4. In User Management, select 'Private Seller'
5. Navigate to: https://admin.popyachts.com/Page/Account-Main-Seller-Lead-Review-External/NA/Page.html

terminate('success') when on the target form page.

Apply search filters on the page:
1. Enter 33101 in the location/zip code field
2. Set search radius to 35 miles
3. Set minimum price to 35000
4. Select 'Private Seller' in the seller type filter
5. Sort by 'Recently Updated' or newest first
6. Wait for results to load

terminate('success') and report how many results you see.

You are on search results. Process the first listing:
1. Find the first listing (scroll if needed)
2. Click it to open
3. Scroll through the page — read Description and More Details
4. Look for a phone number: (555)555-5555, 555-555-5555, 10+ digits
   NOT valid: prices, years, zip codes
5. If phone found: extract year, make, model, price, phone, boat type,
   seller name (or Unknown), read URL from address bar
6. Go back to results (Alt+Left)

terminate('success') with: VIABLE or SKIPPED + all extracted data

Enter lead #1 into the form.

Navigate to: https://admin.popyachts.com/Page/Account-Main-Seller-Lead-Review-External/NA/Page.html

1. Select the appropriate lead type if a selector exists
2. For each form field: click it, type the value
3. Scroll through to find all fields
4. Fill: Year, Make, Model, Type, Price, Seller Name, Phone, URL
5. Click Submit
6. URL changed = success. Form cleared but URL same = rejection (do NOT retry)

terminate('success') if submitted, terminate('failure') if rejected.
